creator: walt@relnor.com
text:
Mr. Linimon,
Sorry but you are mistaken! This port has absolutely NOT been
committed.  You and I discussed this at great length about 2 months
ago.  Please review the discussion trail in the PR and bear in mind
that everything in this PR is directly connected to another PR,
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=126823

Both have been waiting since October for commits (due I think in part
to the 7.1/6.4 release cycle).

Please RE-OPEN this port!  I spent a lot of time on it, I hate to see
it get trashed for no reason.
